description: When get-aem-pages returns no match for the given path, orchestrator stops and asks the user rather than making up a pageId

rubric.description: The model calls get-aem-pages with the JCR path to resolve a pageId before proceeding
After get-aem-pages returns empty items, the model stops and reports the path was not found — it does NOT call get-aem-page-content, patch-aem-page-content, or get-aem-sites
The model never passes the raw JCR path (/content/forms/af/...) as a pageId argument to any MCP tool call
